title: Crossbow
description: Backports the Crossbow from the Village and Pillage update!
body:
### A mod that backports the Crossbow from the Village and Pillage update!
#### **Dependencies:** [AssetMover](https://modrinth.com/mod/assetmover) (required on client)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/igtHDKZJ/images/4d2d4344a9026d74c4092bd28f797a43996ef789.png)

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_46h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crossbow-mod) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crossbow)

If you're a modpack developer wanting to add Crossbow to a modpack distributed outside of CurseForge or Modrinth, use [File Director](https://modrinth.com/mod/filedirector) to avoid reuploading Crossbow's files.

---

This mod backports crossbows from the Village and Pillage update, including enchantments and animations!

Crossbow is designed to serve as a library for anyone wanting to add custom crossbows, or wanting to add entities that use crossbows! To add a custom crossbow item, have your item class extend `ItemCrossbow` or implement `ICrossbow`.

---

This mod also makes some small changes to fireworks:
- Fireworks credit damage (caused by the explosion) to their user, the same way other projectiles credit damage to their user.
- Fireworks dispensed from a dispenser now travel in the direction they were fired. This is an opt-in config setting, and is backported from [Snapshot 19w36a](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_19w36a). 
- Fireworks explode immediately when impacting a block or entity. This change comes with a new event: `FireworkImpactEvent`, which is fired when a firework entity impacts something.

---

##### Direct contact: [jbred.dev@gmail.com](mailto:jbred.dev@gmail.com)
##### This mod will not be ported
